impact: The daemon has been retrying syntax-first and size-guard tests against `ppd.extraction.online_trade_permit_requirements` before that module exists, causing deterministic validation failures and rollbacks. This repair tells the supervisor to preflight target-module existence, keep syntax guards one-file and skip-if-missing until the implementation task exists, and avoid broad extractor rewrites when recent failures are syntax or import-order related.
summary: Add a supervisor repair guide for missing-module syntax guard tasks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-121: Add a one-file syntax-first import test for `ppd.extraction.online_trade_permit_requirements` that imports only that module and fails malformed Python before broad online trade permit requirement validation runs.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
